concierge.title: Tuesday — Deep Work
notes: 🏆 RISE Challenge (Virginia) — Stability accepted! Complete the application
🎤 InnovateSouth deck — finish it, time the pitch (must be under 4 min), upload to Claude for evaluation & improvements
💻 Dedicated Reyla build time — ship something
📝 TextOS product decisions or feature notes
📣 Schedule or queue a social post for the week
🧘 Midday walk — Magazine Street clears the head

private: 💌 Dress up a little — she notices
💬 Check in with Camille today — not just a quick text

blocks.label: Morning Coffee & Focus
tips: Clear head, no noise — set your intention for the day
Deep work starts now. Tuesday is a full-speed day.

blocks.label: Reyla Deep Work
tips: Longest uninterrupted block of the week — protect it
Feature work, not admin. Build what moves the needle.

blocks.label: Lunch Walk
tips: Audubon Park is 10 minutes. Use it.
Real food. Walk. Come back sharper.

blocks.label: TextOS / Product Notes
tips: Write down ideas while they're fresh
Finance agent spec, Telegram provisioner — capture it

blocks.label: Content Block
tips: One piece of content: blog draft, social hook, LinkedIn post
You have 500K followers. Give them something.
